must_have: HTML file with semantic structure (header, main, footer)
CSS file linked to HTML for styling
Page title set to 'Cherry Blossoms Introduction'
Header with navigation links (e.g., Home, About, Contact)
Main content with at least two sections: one for introduction and one for facts
At least one cherry blossom image included with alt text
Responsive design using CSS media queries
All files must be in the same directory
should_have: Use of cherry blossom colors (e.g., pink, white) in styling
Clean and modern layout with proper spacing
Accessible HTML elements (e.g., alt attributes, semantic tags)
could_have: Additional sections like history or cultural significance
